subcodes.first_line: O ye who drink the choice wine of utterance! Today is the Day of remembrance and the Day of steadfastness. The first command hath ever been faith in God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای شاربان رحیق بیان امروز روز ذکر و روز استقامت است اول امر ایمان بالله بوده و
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @knowledge; recognition of God, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause
